column3: It was rough for a first day, wasn't it?
Answer when I ask a question. If you screw up again...you got it?
The last supervisor isn't around anymore.

I need you to stick around a little longer than that
gentleman.
Do you think a person's personality can change?
Personalities are like yachts on water. Once the wind blows, they can't stop.
All I can do is idly watch the other boats...
Or accept where this boat takes me. That's all.
But everyone knows how to change those, right?
Take care of your skin. Exercise. Don't eat sweet stuff at night.
...I have something better to eat anyway, don't I?

column1: # ここから顔アップになり1行36文字に

column3:
Because you're delicious.
...That's not good enough?

That's good then.
    Little people are so yummy.
I wish I could let you have a taste too...

column1: # 顔再び映らない。1行40文字に戻る

column3:
Bye, Rin... Good night.
And sweet dreams.
